Whereas, a petition was duly pre-
scented to the board of public W. KS
for the Improvement of Ninth ave-
nue. by grading. curbing and side

property subject to contribute to
such Improvement, and having made
its report on said petition to the

for: and in accordance with the plans

The, city of Spokane does ordain
as follows:


Section I. That Ninth avenue in
line of billiard street to the center
line of Chandler street. shall be i'm
proved by grading. curbing and side
walking the same, in all respects in
accordance with the plans and speci-
tications therefor


Section 2. That the cost and ex-
pense of said Improvement shall be
borne by the property included in
the assessment district hereinafter
created to the extent of the benefits
received by said property from said
hereinafter provided; and by the city
Of Spokane for the difference. If any
there be. between the actual cost
and expense thereof. and the total
amount of the benefits received by
said property; And said city shall
not be liable in any manner for any
portion Of the costs and expense of
said Improvement other than that
portion herein designated to be borne
by it.


Section 3. The assessment district,
for the purpose or bevying and col
lecting special assessments to the ex-
tent of the benefits received by the
property therein to pay the costs and
expenses of the aforesaid improve
ments as above provided, Is hereby
created and established to consist of
all the lots and parcels of land on
each side of Ninth avenue. except
that occupied by cross streets and
alleys from the center line Of Hilliard
street to the center line of Chandler
street


Said assessment district shall be
known as Ninth Avenue Improve
ment District. Number Two" which is
more particularly described as fol-
lows:


Beginning at the intersection of the
center line of Ninth avenue with the
center line of Hilliard street: thence
north along the center line of Hilliard
street to a point $50 feet north of the
north line OF Ninth avenue: thence
east on line parallel to and 150 feet
from the north line of Ninth avenue

avenue to the center line Of Hilliard

beginning.
